# ellmos-servercommander-mcp

ellmos-servercommander-mcp is an alpha Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for local-first server operations workflows. It exposes diagnostic and dry-run-first tools for HTTP health checks, Apache/Nginx access-log analysis, deployment manifest planning, deployment profile diagnostics, and mail configuration status.

Canonical repository: https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-servercommander-mcp
Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/ellmos-servercommander-mcp
MCP registry name: io.github.ellmos-ai/ellmos-servercommander-mcp
License: MIT
Runtime: Node.js wrapper plus Python 3.10+ MCP server

## Audience

- Developers who want an MCP server for server operations checks.
- Operators who want AI-assisted preflight diagnostics before deployment.
- Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, and MCP host users looking for local-first operations tools.
- ellmos/BACH users who want a server-operations sibling to FileCommander, CodeCommander, Clatcher, n8n Manager, and ControlCenter.

## Current Tools

- `sc_health_check`: checks HTTP endpoints and reports status code plus latency.
- `sc_logs_analyze`: analyzes Apache/Nginx access logs from inline text or a local file path.
- `sc_deploy`: builds a safe dry-run deployment plan with a local SHA256 manifest and profile diagnostics.
- `sc_deploy_status`: shows configured deployment profiles and alpha history status.
- `sc_mail_list`, `sc_mail_read`, `sc_mail_send`, `sc_mail_search`: mail configuration diagnostics without IMAP/SMTP execution.

## Search Phrases

```
MCP server operations tools
MCP deploy dry-run server
MCP access log analyzer
MCP HTTP health check tool
local-first server management MCP
Claude Code server operations MCP
safe SFTP deployment planning MCP
AI assistant server preflight checks
Apache Nginx log analysis MCP
```

## Disambiguation

This is not the GitHub MCP server, not a generic shell-command MCP server, not a cloud-hosted control panel, and not a production SFTP/IMAP executor yet. The alpha release is intentionally diagnostic, dry-run-first, local-first, and safe by default.

## Related ellmos MCP Servers

- ellmos-filecommander-mcp: filesystem operations, process management, OCR, archives, and exports.
- ellmos-codecommander-mcp: code analysis, JSON repair, import management, diffs, regex, and format conversion.
- ellmos-clatcher-mcp: repair, conversion, duplicate detection, batch operations, and document utilities.
- n8n-manager-mcp: n8n workflow management through MCP.
- ellmos-controlcenter-mcp: local MCP discovery, profile management, bundles, and control-plane checks.
- ellmos-homebase-mcp: BACH integration hub, memory, knowledge base, state, swarm, and auto-chain orchestration.

## Last-checked: 2026-06-11
